mission.title: metallb: Add dual-stack support in the controller
mission.description:
Fixes #464 

- [x] Add a `isIPv6` parameter to the pool Allocate functions
- [x] Check `isIPv6` and allocate from a pool with the correct family
- [x] Add test for the new function in `allocator_test.go`
- [x] Add controller tests
- [x] Investigate statistics and update if necessary https://github.com/danderson/metallb/pull/466#issuecomment-533507879

resolution.summary:
The functions can now be tested on a k8s cluster with PR https://github.com/kubernetes/kubernetes/pull/79386 applied.

#### Metallb config;
```
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: config
data:
  config: |
    peers:
    address-pools:
    - name: default
      protocol: layer2
      addresses:
      - 10.0.0.0/28
      - 1000::/124
```
CIRDs with different families defined for the pool.

Services with different families are created;
```
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mconnect-ipv4
spec:
  ipFamily: IPv4
  selector:
    app: mconnect
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: mconnect-ipv6
spec:
  ipFamily: IPv6
  selector:
    app: mconnect
  ports:
  - port: 5001
  type: LoadBalancer
```

The `controller` will assign loadBalancerIP from the right family;
```
# kubectl get svc
NAME            TYPE           CLUSTER-IP        EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)          AGE
coredns         ClusterIP      12.0.0.2          <none>        53/UDP,53/TCP    39s
kubernetes      ClusterIP      12.0.0.1          <none>        443/TCP          40s
mconnect-ipv4   LoadBalancer   12.0.98.75        10.0.0.0      5001:30063/TCP   9s
mconnect-ipv6   LoadBalancer   fd00:4000::d742   1000::        5001:31771/TCP   9s
```
steps: Review the issue discussion for context
Apply the fix from the linked pull request
codeSnippets:
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  namespace: default
  name: config
data:
  config: |
    peers:
    address-pools:

      - 1000::/124

kind: Service

  name: mconnect-ipv6
spec:

    app: mconnect
  ports:

  type: LoadBalancer

# kubectl get svc
NAME            TYPE           CLUSTER-IP        EXTERNAL-IP   PORT(S)          AGE
coredns         ClusterIP      12.0.0.2          <none>        53/UDP,53/TCP    39s
kubernetes      ClusterIP      12.0.0.1          <none>        443/TCP          40s
mconnect-ipv4   LoadBalancer   12.0.98.75        10.0.0.0      5001:30063/TCP   9s
mconnect-ipv6   LoadBalancer   fd00:4000::d742   1000::        5001:31771/TCP   9s
